name: activecampaign
description: Manage contacts, deals, and accounts in ActiveCampaign

envVars.name: ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_KEY
envVars.description: ActiveCampaign API key (sent as the Api-Token header), from My Settings → Developer

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List or search contacts in ActiveCampaign

account.description: ActiveCampaign account subdomain — the 'youraccount' part of https://youraccount.api-us1.com, shown under My Settings → Developer

email.description: Return only the contact with this exact email

search.description: Search contacts by name, email, or phone

offset.description: Number of contacts to skip for pagination

historicalSummary.omitted: contact field values, scores, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.description: Get details of an ActiveCampaign contact

account.description: ActiveCampaign account subdomain — the 'youraccount' part of https://youraccount.api-us1.com

tools.description: Create a new contact in ActiveCampaign

offset.description: Number of deals to skip for pagination

deal.description: Deal payload, e.g. { "title": "Acme renewal", "value": 50000, "currency": "usd", "contact": "<contactId>", "stage": "<stageId>" } — value is in cents

account.description: ActiveCampaign account subdomain — the 'youraccount' part of https://youraccount.api-us1.com

prompts.title: Find a contact
prompts.prompt: Search my ActiveCampaign contacts by email and show their details.

prompts.title: Create a deal
prompts.prompt: Create a new deal in ActiveCampaign with a title, value, and linked contact.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: ActiveCampaign API Setup

steps.title: Find your account subdomain
steps.description: Log in to ActiveCampaign and open My Settings → Developer. Your API URL looks like https://youraccount.api-us1.com — the 'youraccount' part is the value to pass as the 'account' parameter on every tool call. ActiveCampaign offers free developer sandbox accounts via its developer program.

steps.title: Copy your API key
steps.description: On the same Developer page, copy the API Key and add it to your .env as ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_KEY.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Contacts tool with your account subdomain.

notes: The API key is sent in the Api-Token header; each user in the account has their own key with that user's permissions
Every tool requires the 'account' parameter (your API URL subdomain) because the base URL is account-specific (https://{account}.api-us1.com)
Deal values are expressed in cents
